creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 176374
sysutils/ansible: 2.1.2.0 -> 2.2.0.0

Please update sysutils/ansible to 2.2.0.0.
This is a major release with many new modules and features.
It introduces support for Python 3, so relax version check and add a warning.
This adds a USES line to ansible1, the slave port, to keep it at python2.

Changelog is in the URL field.
